title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Apply missing DB migrations 0009–0013 (Stripe webhook broken)
description:
IMPACT: Every Stripe checkout.session.completed event is returning HTTP 500 and being retried infinitely because stripe_events table does not exist in production. NO CUSTOMER CAN SUBSCRIBE until this is fixed.

Verified missing (curl-confirmed 404):
  - stripe_events table (0011) — webhook first INSERT goes here → all webhooks 500
  - customers.user_id column (0009) — register-first flow broken
  - customer_scoring_runs.prompt_count / estimated_cost_usd (0012) — quota code fails
  - customers_subscription_status_check constraint (0013) — invalid statuses writable

FIX (5 minutes):
  1. Open: https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/unrfdcxkmelafypuyruk/sql/new
  2. Paste the full contents of: supabase/migrations/pending_delta_0009_0013.sql
  3. Click 'Run'
  4. Verify: the last SELECT in the script must include 'stripe_events' in the output

This file is idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS / constraint-existence checks everywhere). Safe to run even if some columns already exist — it will skip those and apply only what's missing.

DO NOT run 0000_apply_all.sql (it would recreate tables that already exist — the delta file is safer).

After applying, replay any failed Stripe webhooks:
  Stripe Dashboard → Developers → Webhooks → your endpoint → Recent deliveries → Resend failed events.

title: Create Sentry project and add SENTRY_DSN to Vercel
description:
Error reporting infrastructure is wired up and waiting for a Sentry DSN. Steps to activate:

1. Go to https://sentry.io and create a free account (50k errors/mo on free tier).
2. Create a new project: Platform = Next.js, Project name = neuralreach-app.
3. Copy the DSN (looks like: https://abc123@o123456.ingest.sentry.io/789012).
4. In Vercel dashboard -> neuralreach-app -> Settings -> Environment Variables: add SENTRY_DSN = <your DSN> (all environments). Optionally add SENTRY_ORG and SENTRY_PROJECT for source-map uploads later.
5. Run: npm install in the ai-visibility-tracker directory to install @sentry/nextjs (already added to package.json).
6. Redeploy the app (Vercel UI or git push).

Once SENTRY_DSN is set, all reportError() calls across API routes will forward to Sentry with full context (route, customerId, stack trace). The dashboard scan-timeout UI is already deployed and works without Sentry.

No ongoing cost: Sentry free tier is 50k errors/month and 10k transactions.

title: Complete 4 dashboard actions: Supabase Auth URLs, Email provider, Resend DNS, DB migration
description:
Four founder-only dashboard actions needed before the subscriber product can go end-to-end. Full checklist with copy-paste values at: state/artifacts/approvals/combined_dashboard_actions_2026-06-01.md

1. Supabase Auth URL config (5 min) — https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/unrfdcxkmelafypuyruk/auth/url-configuration
   Set Site URL = https://neuralreach.de
   Add to Redirect URLs: https://neuralreach.de/auth/callback, https://www.neuralreach.de/auth/callback, http://localhost:3000/auth/callback

2. Supabase Email provider (5 min) — https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/unrfdcxkmelafypuyruk/auth/providers
   Enable Email provider = ON, Confirm email = ON, Min password length = 8

3. Resend DNS fix (10-15 min) — https://resend.com/domains
   All 5 records for mail.neuralreach.de are wrong. Delete each, re-add from Resend dashboard.
   SPF: v=spf1 include:amazonses.com ~all (on mail.neuralreach.de)
   3x DKIM CNAME: copy exact values from Resend domain panel
   DMARC: v=DMARC1; p=none; (on _dmarc.mail.neuralreach.de)

4. Production DB migration (5 min) — https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/unrfdcxkmelafypuyruk/sql/new
   Run supabase/migrations/0001_init.sql through 0013_subscription_status_check.sql in order.
   Verify: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public';

Bonus: Confirm EMAIL_DRY_RUN is NOT set (or is 0/false) in Vercel Production env vars.

NOTE: The DB migration step is now superseded by A-delta0913 which applies only the missing delta (0009-0013) more safely.

title: 🚨 4TH ATTEMPT: Fix Resend DNS on united-domains.de — zero emails since launch
description:
IMPACT: Every single email (OTP login codes, welcome emails, weekly digests) has been silently failing since the product launched. Users cannot log in via OTP. This is blocking M1 / first paying customer.

VERIFIED BROKEN RIGHT NOW (2026-06-10):
  dig +short resend._domainkey.mail.neuralreach.de CNAME  →  (EMPTY — DKIM never added in 3 prior attempts)
  dig +short mail.neuralreach.de TXT                      →  "inbound-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com" (WRONG — not SPF)
  dig +short _dmarc.mail.neuralreach.de TXT               →  (EMPTY)

FULL RUNBOOK (read every line): state/artifacts/runbooks/resend_dns_fix_FOURTH_ATTEMPT_2026-06-10.md

QUICK SUMMARY — 6 DNS changes at united-domains.de:

  STEP 1 (Resend dashboard first):
    https://resend.com/domains → click mail.neuralreach.de → SCREENSHOT or keep open
    You need the exact CNAME values — they're unique to your account

  STEP 2 (united-domains.de DNS editor for neuralreach.de):
    DELETE:  TXT  mail.neuralreach.de  =  "inbound-smtp.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com"
    ADD:     TXT  mail               =  "v=spf1 include:amazonses.com ~all"
    ADD:     CNAME  resend._domainkey.mail  =  [copy from Resend dashboard]
    ADD:     CNAME  [2nd DKIM key name]     =  [copy from Resend dashboard]
    ADD:     CNAME  [3rd DKIM key name]     =  [copy from Resend dashboard]
    ADD:     TXT  _dmarc.mail              =  "v=DMARC1; p=none; rua=mailto:dmarc@neuralreach.de"

  STEP 3 (Resend dashboard):
    Click 'Verify DNS Records' → all rows should go green ✅

  STEP 4 (Vercel):
    Confirm EMAIL_DRY_RUN is NOT set (or is false/0) in Production environment variables

  STEP 5 (test):
    Try OTP login → you should receive the email within 30 seconds

WHY PREVIOUS ATTEMPTS FAILED: The DKIM CNAME was never added in attempts 1, 2, or 3.
This is the single most important record. Without it Resend refuses to send.

title: Post 4 AI Visibility Index launch posts (Reddit + Indie Hackers)
description:
When the leaderboard is live, manually copy-paste and publish the following four posts. Final copy is in state/artifacts/marketing/launch_posts/.

1. r/SEO -- state/artifacts/marketing/launch_posts/r_SEO.md
   Headline: We audited how 100 B2B SaaS brands appear (or don't) in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews -- here's what we found
   Tone: technical/resource-sharing, no selling. Best time: Tue/Wed 9-11 AM EST.

2. r/SaaS -- state/artifacts/marketing/launch_posts/r_SaaS.md
   Headline: I checked whether 100 B2B SaaS companies show up when buyers ask ChatGPT/Perplexity/Claude what tool should I use -- the results are surprising
   Tone: business problem framing, light product mention OK. Best time: Mon/Thu 10 AM-12 PM EST.

3. r/SideProject -- state/artifacts/marketing/launch_posts/r_SideProject.md
   Headline: I built a free leaderboard showing how 100 SaaS companies rank in AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AIO) -- NeuralReach AI Visibility Index
   Tone: I built X showcase. Best time: Sat/Sun 10 AM-1 PM EST.

4. Indie Hackers -- state/artifacts/marketing/launch_posts/indie_hackers.md
   Headline: Day 0: I launched a free AI Visibility Index for 100 SaaS brands to validate demand for NeuralReach -- here's the plan and what I'm tracking
   Tone: build-in-public, metrics-honest. Best time: Tue/Wed/Thu 9-11 AM EST.

Each post has 3 pre-written FAQ replies ready for top comments. Replace [URL] with the live leaderboard URL before posting. No accounts or budget required -- Reddit and Indie Hackers accounts must be founder's own.
